category_sources: source_facts.description says jigdo distributes very large files over the internet; official homepage https://www.einval.com/~steve/software/jigdo/ describes Jigsaw Download for large-file distribution.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jigdo; official homepage heading uses jigdo - Jigsaw Download.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface and includes introduction, history, downloads, and support notes.
repo_sources: Official homepage states the new home for jigdo source code is git.einval.com and links to that source-control browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists command-line tools; official homepage describes large-file distribution and CD/DVD image use cases.
